description: Premium noise-cancelling wireless headphones with 30-hour battery life. crystal-clear audio and deep bass for an immersive listening experience.
Handpicked organic green tea from the mountains of Japan. 20 tea bags per box. Rich in antioxidants and naturally caffeine-light.
Adjustable lumbar support, breathable mesh back, and premium cushioning. Designed for all-day comfort in your home office.
Double-wall vacuum insulated. Keeps drinks cold for 24 hours or hot for 12 hours. 750ml capacity. BPA-free.
Touch-controlled with 5 brightness levels and 3 color temperatures. Built-in USB charging port and adjustable gooseneck.
Vintage-style waxed canvas backpack with padded laptop compartment. Spacious main compartment with multiple organizer pockets.
Hot-swappable switches, per-key RGB backlighting, and a compact 75% layout. Gateron Brown switches included. USB-C detachable cable.
6mm thick eco-friendly TPE yoga mat. Non-slip textured surface on both sides. Includes carrying strap. Perfect for home workouts.
